data.description: You can use your breath as a weapon. You have a breath weapon of the type associated with your dragon ancestry, dealt as force damage.

Your Draconic Ancestry. Vou have draconic ancestry. You share other traits with dragonborn. Choose one type of dragon the Draconic Ancestry from the table. Your Strength score increases by 2 and your Charisma score increases by 1. The age at which you reach young adulthood is indicated, as well as the size and shape of the breath weapon that you can use. Determined by draconic ancestry, your alignment tends to be either good or evil (represented by Bahamut and Tiamat, respectively). Most dragonborn are good. A bonus to Constitution modifier and proficiency in saving throws is granted. The size of a dragonborn is Medium and their base walking speed is 30 feet.
